title: Mutual Friends & A Comeback 🤝
excerpt: Added two revolutionary updates and we are back on Chrome.
body: Recently, Friends Remover was hit hard by the removal of our extension. After weeks of rebuilding and improving, we're finally back—and stronger than ever. This may be our biggest update yet, bringing massive new features, major improvements, and countless bug fixes. We hope you enjoy this update, as it may be our last major update for a while. Thank you to everyone who continued to support Friends Remover throughout this journey. We couldn't have made this comeback without you.

added.text: Special welcome messages in popup menu (Plus only)
added.moreInfo: Displays custom welcome messages for FR+ users when opening the popup.

added.text: Flagged filter for users flagged by Rotectors API
added.moreInfo: Automatically filters and highlights users flagged by the system for safer management.

added.text: Suggest pins system in popup settings
added.moreInfo: Recommends friends to pin based on activity patterns.
Lets you see shared friends between accounts directly in the popup.
FR+ is now a subscription-based system using Roblox gamepass ownership checks.
Users must enter an email before purchasing FR+ for verification.
Users must accept FR+ terms before accessing premium features.
Adds extra protection for FR+ users during sensitive actions.

removed.moreInfo: This filter has been permanently removed and will not return.

removed.text: Notify if a Friend Removes You (Plus only)
removed.moreInfo: This FR+ feature has been removed due to system changes.
The Rocaptcha system has been fully removed from the extension.

fixed.text: Settings no longer switch to mobile UI when resizing
fixed.moreInfo: Fixes layout issues when resizing the window.

fixed.text: Search and filter buttons now properly disable during loading/menu
fixed.moreInfo: Prevents user actions during loading states.

fixed.text: Block mode logo no longer appears on popup open
Fixed incorrect theme showing during loading (cached theme fix)
fixed.moreInfo: Ensures last theme is properly restored on startup.

fixed.text: Unpin button fixed for banned accounts
fixed.moreInfo: Fixes unpin issues for restricted users.

fixed.text: Menu now opens correctly when previously opened
Fixed 'undefined has been removed from friends list' notification
fixed.moreInfo: Prevents invalid username display in notifications.

fixed.text: Search button fixed after closing history
fixed.moreInfo: Fixes missing search UI after history view.

fixed.text: UserDataManager method fixed (setSetting vs saveSetting mismatch)

improved.text: Compact viewer arrows now loop continuously
improved.moreInfo: Smooth infinite navigation in compact view.
Faster and more reliable FR+ detection on startup.

improved.text: Popup handling of active removals improved
Resume system for ongoing removals improved
Sent state now persists using local storage

improved.moreInfo: Instant UI updates after untrust actions.

improved.text: Bulk selection now persists after popup reopen
Overall performance and loading stability improved

other.text: Schedule Removal now shows FR+ toast for non-Plus users
other.moreInfo: Prompts upgrade when accessing FR+ features.

other.text: Status updated to show logged in username
other.moreInfo: Displays current user in status bar.

other.text: Rocaptcha now fades headless and same-color avatars
Pre-send check shows toast if already friends
Code 5 handling shows pending state with ✓ Sent button
Rate limit (429) shows cooldown toast and resets button
Unpin option added to three-dots menu (bulk select only)
other.moreInfo: When bulk selecting you can unpin pinned users via the three dots.

other.text: Menu can now be accessed during removal screen
FR+ features now run without API calls using ownership detection
